ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  DiGiSPICE Technologies Limited convened an equity shareholders' meeting, mandated by the National Company Law Tribunal, to vote on a significant Scheme of Amalgamation. This proposed merger aims to integrate three companies—Spice Money Limited, E-Arth Travel Solutions Private Limited, and Vikasni Fintech Private Limited—into DiGiSPICE. Shareholders have cast their votes on this major corporate restructuring, with the official results yet to be announced.
